title: Incorrect result involving concat, ternary expression, and indexing with underflow

features.name: unsigned subtraction underflow in ternary as array index
features.description: Code should include a ternary expression with unsigned subtraction that underflows when used as an array index

features.name: concatenation with array accessed via ternary index
features.description: Code should include a concatenation containing an array element accessed via a ternary expression that may produce underflow
